togaf_phases.name: Architecture Vision
togaf_phases.description: Initial phase of an architecture development cycle.

togaf_phases.name: Business Architecture
togaf_phases.description: Development of a Business Architecture to support an agreed Architecture Vision.

togaf_phases.name: Information Systems Architectures
togaf_phases.description: Development of Information Systems Architectures for an IT project.

togaf_phases.name: Opportunities & Solutions
togaf_phases.description: Initial implementation planning and the identification of delivery vehicles.

togaf_phases.name: Migration Planning
togaf_phases.description: Formulation of a set of detailed sequence of transition architectures.

ea_principles.name: Primacy of Principles
ea_principles.statement: These principles of information management apply to all organizations within the enterprise.

ea_principles.name: Maximize Benefit to the Enterprise
ea_principles.statement: Information management decisions are made to provide maximum benefit to the enterprise as a whole.

ea_principles.name: Information Management is Everybody's Business
ea_principles.statement: All organizations in the enterprise participate in information management decisions needed to accomplish business objectives.

ea_principles.name: Business Continuity
ea_principles.statement: Enterprise operations are maintained in spite of system interruptions.

ea_principles.name: Common Use Applications
ea_principles.statement: Development of applications used across the enterprise is preferred over the development of similar or duplicative applications which are only provided to a particular organization.

Security Threat Report
